case_title: AHURUONYE, BLESSING et al vs. ATHON, PHILLIP et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AHURUONYE, BLESSING NKORONYE, EMEKA AS TO DEFENDANT ATHON, PHILLIP DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-21-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-23-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-01-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-21-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-21-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR AUG-23-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-07-1995, CONTINUED TO MAY-23-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF PROOF OF SERVICE PRIOR TO 5/23/95. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-23-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-23-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-22-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-22-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-22-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), SANCTION OF $50.00 ISSUED BY COURT ON PLAINTIFF AND PLFF'S COUNSEL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-21-1995 CONTINUED FROM JUN-22-1995 TO JUL-24-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-24-1995, CONTINUED TO AUG-23-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 $50.00 SANCTIONS TO BE POSTED FORTHWITH; ALL OTHER OSC HEARINGS AND SANCTIONS DISCHARGED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF AHURUONYE, BLESSING NKORONYE, EMEKA
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-23-1995, CONTINUED TO OCT-25-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-25-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-25-1995, AND AS TO WHY NO DEFAULT JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE IF NECESSARY. HEARING SET FOR NOV-22-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-22-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND OSC FOR PLAINTIFF: AS TO WHY CASE HAS NOT BEEN DISMISSED OR A DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED. PLAINTIFF'S ATTY. IS TO APPEAR IF CASE HAS NOT BEEN DISMISSED OR DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED. HEARING SET FOR JAN-09-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-09-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED OSC FOR FILING OF DISMISSAL OR DEFAULT JUDGMENT. IF NOT FILED, COURT MAY DISMISS CASE. HEARING SET FOR FEB-08-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-08-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-08-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), IF NO APPEARANCE ON 3/22/96 CASE WILL BE DISMISSED. HEARING SET FOR MAR-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF AHURUONYE, BLESSING

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-22-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-22-1996, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), $100.00 SANCTIONS IMPOSED BUT STAYED PENDING DISMISSAL BEING FILED BEFORE 4/22/96. APPEARANCE IS WAIVED IF DISMISSAL FILED. PREVIOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS HEREBY DISCHARGED. HEARING SET FOR APR-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
PHOTOCOPY FOR 1 COPY FOR CASE NUMBER 102875. FOR PLAINTIFF AHURUONYE, BLESSING
